text: Three Rows, Two Headquarters
textPreview: Three Rows, Two Headquarters

text: Frontline controls pressure and attacks

text: MATCH FLOW
textPreview: MATCH FLOW

text: From Starter Deck to End Turn Loop
textPreview: From Starter Deck to End Turn Loop

text: The current flow starts with deck choice, runs a mulligan, then cycles draw, refresh, action, enemy AI, and game-over checks.

text: Select or Drag, Then Commit

text: FRONTLINE WORKFLOW
textPreview: FRONTLINE WORKFLOW

text: Advance Units to Create Pressure
textPreview: Advance Units to Create Pressure

text: Support units spend operation cost to move forward, while frontline control limits when new units can advance.
textPreview: Support units spend operation cost to move forward, while frontline control limits when new units can advance.

text: Move from support to empty frontline slots

text: Control rules prevent free reinforcement
textPreview: Control rules prevent free reinforcement
